p_named.text:
Lily and the cat  became friends and they went for a walk in the park together. They saw many trees and flowers and even a little pond. 

As they walked, Lily's mom reminded her to always be careful and to watch where she was going. Lily nodded and promised to be careful.
Lily and the cat  played together every day. They ran and jumped and had so much fun. Lily loved to make the cat happy. They were the best of friends.

Lily and the cat  played together for a while, chasing each other around the yard, and having fun. When it was time to go home, Lily said goodbye to the cat and promised to come back and play with it again soon.
Lily and the cat  went to the barn together, and Lily was happy to have a new friend. She learned that being kind and helpful is much more important than having shiny things.
Lily and the cat  went home, happy and content. They both felt very lucky to have such a kind and thoughtful friend.
